haiku45.summary_excerpt: Critical: workflow references missing tests/aggregator.bats (line 19) and fixture files (lines 22-24). Tests and fixtures not provided. Only 1 test case via act despite complex requirements. No TDD evidence. Python parsing embedded in bash heredocs (test-results-aggregator.sh lines 29-46, 52-75) hampers maintainability. Actions unpinned to SHA.

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent implementation. Using Python heredocs for XML/JSON parsing (lines 35, 68) is far more robust than Bash regex. Proper use of `set -euo pipefail`, `mktemp`, and `trap` (line 127) ensures reliability. The workflow is well-structured with least-privilege permissions and clear steps.
